summary: WIN-025 cluster-consistency vocabulary catchup. Three full-field replacements (finding, detail_verdict_text, tldr_verdict) replace the 2026-04-12 pre-rename phrasing 'dome's refraction cascade' and 'sun's physical position seasonally indeterminate' with the current 'Section 1.8 (The Coordinate Collapse)' cross-reference and n(r) 300–6,000× contamination framing used in WIN-010 c5/c6 and WIN-068 c9. Also concedes the FSF = H(r)/r geometric derivation (Pearson r ≈ 0.9999) from the WIN-010/WIN-068 cluster so a reader navigating the triple-count cluster sees a consistent stance. Triple-count-inflation closing sentence preserved verbatim; verdict unchanged (Std Model Explains). All three pre-images verified to equal the exact current field values.
